effects.effect: Add 1 [Bird] or Neutral Vivosaur from your Deck to your Hand.

effects.name: Scary Squi Entrance!
effects.effect: After this Vivosaur is played: apply Scare to a Vivosaur and charge 1 [Bird] Vivosaur from your Discard Pile.

effects.name: Dark Tremor
effects.effect: You can return this Vivosaur to your hand, then play a non-Neutral [Bird] Vivosaur from your Hand.
